## 🔧 Como Funciona o Reverse Proxy

### Nginx Configuration (`nginx.conf`)

O Nginx recebe requisições na porta **8081** e distribui por **path**:

```nginx
# N8N: https://domínio/n8n/*
location /n8n/ {
    rewrite ^/n8n/(.*) /$1 break;  # Remove /n8n do path
    proxy_pass http://n8n:5678;    # Container N8N
}

# Evolution API: https://domínio/evo/*
location /evo/ {
    rewrite ^/evo/(.*) /$1 break;
    proxy_pass http://evolution-api:8080;
}

# Chatwoot: https://domínio/chat/*
location /chat/ {
    rewrite ^/chat/(.*) /$1 break;
    proxy_pass http://chatwoot-rails:3000;
}
```

### Vantagens desta Arquitetura

✅ **Apenas 1 túnel SSH** (em vez de 3)
✅ **Apenas 1 terminal** (em vez de 3)
✅ **Apenas 1 URL pública** com paths organizados
✅ **N8N oficial no Docker** (não precisa rodar localmente)
✅ **Shutdown limpo** com SSH Control Socket
✅ **WebSocket suportado** (Evolution, Chatwoot Cable, N8N editor)
✅ **Health checks** para todos os serviços
✅ **Auto-restart** com healthcheck dependencies

## ⚠️ Troubleshooting

### Túnel não funciona (502)
```powershell
# 1. Verificar se Nginx está rodando
curl http://localhost:8081/health

# 2. Verificar logs do Nginx
docker compose logs nginx

# 3. Verificar se containers estão up
docker compose ps
```

### N8N não acessível
```powershell
# Ver logs do N8N
docker compose logs -f n8n

# Verificar se PostgreSQL está ok
docker compose logs postgres

# Verificar database N8N criado
docker compose exec postgres psql -U postgres -c "\l"
```

### Chatwoot não carrega
```powershell
# Reiniciar Chatwoot
docker compose restart chatwoot-rails chatwoot-sidekiq

# Rodar migrations do Chatwoot
docker compose exec chatwoot-rails bundle exec rails db:chatwoot_prepare
```

### Erro "remote port forwarding failed"
**Causa:** Túnel órfão no servidor Serveo

**Solução:**
1. Pressione **Ctrl+C** no script (shutdown limpo via SSH Control Socket)
2. Aguardar 2-3 segundos
3. Executar novamente: `.\tunnel-all.ps1`

Se persistir: `.\cleanup-tunnels.ps1`

### Containers não iniciam
```powershell
# Ver status detalhado
docker compose ps -a

# Ver logs de erro
docker compose logs [servico]

# Verificar rede Docker
docker network ls
docker network inspect docker-n8n-evo_minha_rede
```

## 🐛 Problemas Encontrados e Resolvidos

### Problema 1: Conflito de Porta 5678

**Erro:**
```
Error: Ports are not available: exposing port TCP 0.0.0.0:5678
bind: Only one usage of each socket address
```

**Causa:** Processo N8N local (node) ocupando a porta 5678

**Solução:**
```powershell
# Identificar processo
netstat -ano | findstr :5678
# PID: 6220

# Terminar processo
powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 6220 -Force"

# Reiniciar containers
docker compose up -d
```

**Status:** ✅ Resolvido

---

## 🐛 Problemas Encontrados e Resolvidos

### Problema 1: Conflito de Porta 5678

**Erro:**
```
Error: Ports are not available: exposing port TCP 0.0.0.0:5678
bind: Only one usage of each socket address
```

**Causa:** Processo N8N local (node) ocupando a porta 5678

**Solução:**
```powershell
# Identificar processo
netstat -ano | findstr :5678
# PID: 6220

# Terminar processo
powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 6220 -Force"

# Reiniciar containers
docker compose up -d
```

**Status:** ✅ Resolvido

---

### Problema 2: Scripts Obsoletos no Diretório Raiz

**Descrição:** Muitos scripts antigos de túneis individuais poluíam o diretório raiz.

**Solução:**
- Mover 11 scripts obsoletos para `docs/old/`
- Manter apenas os scripts essenciais na raiz:
  - `tunnel-all.ps1` (principal)
  - `test-services.ps1` (testes)
  - `cleanup-tunnels.ps1` (cleanup)
  - `stop-all.ps1` (shutdown)
  - `test-list-ssh.ps1` (diagnóstico)
  - `verificar-rapido.ps1` (novo)

**Status:** ✅ Resolvido

### Problema 3: test-services.ps1 Desatualizado

**Descrição:** Script ainda referenciava `start-n8n.ps1` (obsoleto) e faltava testes do Nginx.

**Solução:**
- Atualizar script para arquitetura v2.0
- Adicionar testes do Nginx Reverse Proxy
- Adicionar testes do N8N Docker

content.text: Vou criar um script para manter o túnel ativo e reiniciar:

input.content:
# =============================================================================
# INICIAR TUDO - Docker + Túnel
# =============================================================================
# Este script inicia os containers e o túnel público
# =============================================================================

Write-Host "============================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "  INICIANDO DOCKER STACK + TÚNEL PÚBLICO" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "============================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host ""

# 1. Iniciar Docker
Write-Host "[1/2] Iniciando containers Docker..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
docker compose up -d

Write-Host "Aguardando containers iniciarem..." -ForegroundColor Gray
Start-Sleep -Seconds 10

Write-Host "Verificando N8N database..." -ForegroundColor Gray
docker compose exec postgres psql -U postgres -c "SELECT 1 FROM pg_database WHERE datname='n8n'" | grep -q 1 || docker compose exec postgres psql -U postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE n8n;"

Write-Host "Reiniciando N8N..." -ForegroundColor Gray
docker compose restart n8n

Start-Sleep -Seconds 5

# 2. Limpar túneis antigos
Write-Host ""
Write-Host "[2/2] Limpando túneis antigos..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
.\cleanup-tunnels.ps1

# 3. Iniciar túnel em background
Write-Host "Iniciando túnel Serveo (background)..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
$sshCommand = "ssh -M -S `$env:USERPROFILE\.ssh\tunnel-all.sock -o ServerAliveInterval=60 -o ExitOnForwardFailure=yes -N -R maceio-all-serveo:80:localhost:8081 serveo.net"

$process = Start-Process -FilePath "ssh" -ArgumentList `
    "-M", "-S", "$env:USERPROFILE\.ssh\tunnel-all.sock", `
    "-o", "ServerAliveInterval=60", `
    "-o", "ExitOnForwardFailure=yes", `
    "-N", `
    "-R", "maceio-all-serveo:80:localhost:8081", `
    "serveo.net" `
    -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden

Write-Host "Túnel iniciado (PID: $($process.Id))" -ForegroundColor Green
Start-Sleep -Seconds 10

# 4. Testar URLs
Write-Host ""
Write-Host "Testando URLs públicas..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host ""

try {
    $health = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://maceio-all-serveo.serveousercontent.com/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5
    Write-Host "  [✓] Nginx Health: $($health.StatusCode)" -ForegroundColor Green
} catch {
    Write-Host "  [✗] Nginx Health: FALHOU" -ForegroundColor Red
}

try {
    $n8n = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://maceio-all-serveo.serveousercontent.com/n8n/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5
    Write-Host "  [✓] N8N: $($n8n.StatusCode)" -ForegroundColor Green
} catch {
    Write-Host "  [✗] N8N: FALHOU" -ForegroundColor Red
}

try {
    $evo = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://maceio-all-serveo.serveousercontent.com/evo/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5
    Write-Host "  [✓] Evolution API: $($evo.StatusCode)" -ForegroundColor Green
} catch {
    Write-Host "  [✗] Evolution API: FALHOU" -ForegroundColor Red
}

try {
    $chat = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://maceio-all-serveo.serveousercontent.com/chat/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5
    Write-Host "  [✓] Chatwoot: $($chat.StatusCode)" -ForegroundColor Green
} catch {
    Write-Host "  [✗] Chatwoot: FALHOU" -ForegroundColor Red
}

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "============================================" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "  SERVIÇOS ONLINE!" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "============================================" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host ""
Write-Host "URLs Públicas:" -ForegroundColor Cyan

toolUseResult.content:
# =============================================================================
# INICIAR TUDO - Docker + Túnel
# =============================================================================
# Este script inicia os containers e o túnel público
# =============================================================================

Write-Host "============================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "  INICIANDO DOCKER STACK + TÚNEL PÚBLICO" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "============================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host ""

# 1. Iniciar Docker
Write-Host "[1/2] Iniciando containers Docker..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
docker compose up -d

Write-Host "Aguardando containers iniciarem..." -ForegroundColor Gray
Start-Sleep -Seconds 10

Write-Host "Verificando N8N database..." -ForegroundColor Gray
docker compose exec postgres psql -U postgres -c "SELECT 1 FROM pg_database WHERE datname='n8n'" | grep -q 1 || docker compose exec postgres psql -U postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE n8n;"

Write-Host "Reiniciando N8N..." -ForegroundColor Gray
docker compose restart n8n

Start-Sleep -Seconds 5

# 2. Limpar túneis antigos
Write-Host ""
Write-Host "[2/2] Limpando túneis antigos..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
.\cleanup-tunnels.ps1

# 3. Iniciar túnel em background
Write-Host "Iniciando túnel Serveo (background)..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
$sshCommand = "ssh -M -S `$env:USERPROFILE\.ssh\tunnel-all.sock -o ServerAliveInterval=60 -o ExitOnForwardFailure=yes -N -R maceio-all-serveo:80:localhost:8081 serveo.net"

$process = Start-Process -FilePath "ssh" -ArgumentList `
    "-M", "-S", "$env:USERPROFILE\.ssh\tunnel-all.sock", `
    "-o", "ServerAliveInterval=60", `
    "-o", "ExitOnForwardFailure=yes", `
    "-N", `
    "-R", "maceio-all-serveo:80:localhost:8081", `
    "serveo.net" `
    -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden

Write-Host "Túnel iniciado (PID: $($process.Id))" -ForegroundColor Green
Start-Sleep -Seconds 10

# 4. Testar URLs
Write-Host ""
Write-Host "Testando URLs públicas..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host ""

try {
    $health = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://maceio-all-serveo.serveousercontent.com/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5
    Write-Host "  [✓] Nginx Health: $($health.StatusCode)" -ForegroundColor Green
} catch {
    Write-Host "  [✗] Nginx Health: FALHOU" -ForegroundColor Red
}

try {
    $n8n = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://maceio-all-serveo.serveousercontent.com/n8n/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5
    Write-Host "  [✓] N8N: $($n8n.StatusCode)" -ForegroundColor Green
} catch {
    Write-Host "  [✗] N8N: FALHOU" -ForegroundColor Red
}

try {
    $evo = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://maceio-all-serveo.serveousercontent.com/evo/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5
    Write-Host "  [✓] Evolution API: $($evo.StatusCode)" -ForegroundColor Green
} catch {
    Write-Host "  [✗] Evolution API: FALHOU" -ForegroundColor Red
}

try {
    $chat = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://maceio-all-serveo.serveousercontent.com/chat/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5
    Write-Host "  [✓] Chatwoot: $($chat.StatusCode)" -ForegroundColor Green
} catch {
    Write-Host "  [✗] Chatwoot: FALHOU" -ForegroundColor Red
}

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "============================================" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "  SERVIÇOS ONLINE!" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "============================================" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host ""
Write-Host "URLs Públicas:" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "  • N8N:        https://maceio-all-serveo.serveousercontent.com/n8n/" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host "  • Evolution:  https://maceio-all-serveo.serveousercontent.com/evo/" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host "  • Chatwoot:   https://maceio-all-serveo.serveousercontent.com/chat/" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host ""
Write-Host "Credenciais N8N:" -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host "  User: admin" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host "  Pass: N3wK6O0w005VVpFjaOhF" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host ""
Write-Host "Para parar o túnel: .\cleanup-tunnels.ps1" -ForegroundColor Gray
Write-Host ""

```
https://maceio-all-serveo.serveousercontent.com/chat/
```

|---------|-------------|--------|

---

## 🛠️ Comandos Úteis

### Verificar Status
```powershell
.\check.ps1
```

### Parar Túnel
```powershell
.\cleanup-tunnels.ps1
```

### Reiniciar Tudo

```powershell
.\iniciar-tudo.ps1
```

```powershell

docker compose logs -f chatwoot-rails
```

## 📝 Acesso Local (se precisar)

- **N8N:** http://localhost:5678
- **Evolution:** http://localhost:8080
- **Chatwoot:** http://localhost:3000

## ⚠️ Importante

O túnel SSH está rodando em **background**. Se você fechar o terminal ou reiniciar o computador, o túnel será encerrado.

Para reiniciar:
```powershell
.\iniciar-tudo.ps1
```

Ou apenas o túnel:
```powershell
ssh -f -M -S "$HOME/.ssh/tunnel-all.sock" -o ServerAliveInterval=60 -N -R maceio-all-serveo:80:localhost:8081 serveo.net
```

---
